title: [Skyship, Storage]
description: Tall wooden crates evenly line the area and are pressed up against the metal bulkheads.  Some are open-topped and contain armaments, including metal swords, shields, and varying pieces of heavy armor.  Others visibly overflow with more mundane supplies, from animal pelts to bolts of thick cloth to bundled wooden cords.  Above these crates, broad ropes dangle from numerous metal hooks, with some of these ropes remaining attached to individual crates to aid movement.
